calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeiffer; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 207).
Appearances:
John Zanghi, Esq. for and with the plaintiff John Stewart Company represented by Marsha Jackson.
Tyler Macmillan, Esq., representing the defendant Christine Harris through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Parties enter into a signed Settlement Agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 88 Sixth St., #332, San Francisco, California.

Trial date of Oct 19, 2009 is vacated.
